problem id: 209e62c5
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2)

examples:
  00101010 -> 10101000
  00110000 -> 11000000
  11001110 -> 00111011
  10010000 -> 01000010
  00110101 -> 11010100
  01111111 -> 11111101
  01110011 -> 11001101
  10000000 -> 00000010

query: 01011110
predicted answer: 01111001
